allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('name:', d.get\('name'\)\); print\('url:', d.get\('ssl_url'\)\); print\('custom_domain:', d.get\('custom_domain'\)\); ssl=d.get\('ssl'\); print\('ssl_state:', ssl\)" echo "" done)

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\)\); const u=d.users; const key=Object.keys\(u\)[0]; console.log\('token:', u[key].auth?.token?.slice\(0,8\)+'...'\); console.log\('email:', u[key].email\);")

Bash(node -e " const d = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\)\); const names = ['sightproof','sitewrap','classvoice','kindredgrants','threadkey','tubeprofit']; d.forEach\(s => { const match = names.find\(n => s.name && s.name.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(n\)\); if \(match\) console.log\(match, s.id, s.ssl_url, s.custom_domain\); }\); ")
